base-ocr.label: Base local OCR
base-ocr.purpose: Private local OCR for English and simplified Chinese images plus text PDF extraction.

base-ocr-python.label: Base Python local OCR
base-ocr-python.purpose: Private local OCR without apt/sudo dependency. Uses RapidOCR ONNX Runtime plus Pillow/OpenCV.
base-ocr-python.notes: Preferred for packaged enterprise deployments because it lives inside agent-system/.venv.

enhanced-ocr.label: Enhanced Chinese OCR
enhanced-ocr.purpose: Higher quality Chinese document OCR for legal, accounting, and media-office deployments.
enhanced-ocr.notes: Install only when needed. This pack is larger and may download model weights into the local cache.

base-rag-zh.label: Base local Chinese RAG embeddings
base-rag-zh.purpose: Local semantic retrieval for Chinese-heavy knowledge bases.
base-rag-zh.notes: Model weights are cached locally after first download. Use for default digital office, law firm, accounting firm, and Chinese media studio deployments.

base-rag-en.label: Base local English RAG embeddings
base-rag-en.purpose: Small local semantic retrieval for English-only projects.

enhanced-rag-multilingual.label: Enhanced multilingual RAG embeddings
enhanced-rag-multilingual.purpose: Local multilingual and longer-context retrieval for larger mixed-language document sets.
enhanced-rag-multilingual.notes: Heavier than bge-small-zh-v1.5. Use when projects contain mixed Chinese/English material, longer documents, or retrieval quality is more important than speed.
